summary: Classified the PR inventory shard independently. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job. Closed PRs are kept closed as historical context; open useful PRs are kept open unless maintainer/product judgment is explicitly required.
